creator: jfc@mit.edu
text:
I did not intentionally omit __aeabi_uldivmod.  I probably mistook it for a second instance of __aeabi_uidivmod.  I should have used sort -u instead of manually removing duplicates.  This ought to generate the right list:

nm --defined-only /usr/obj/usr/src/arm.armv7/tmp/usr/lib/libgcc.a|awk '/__aeabi_[^m]/ { print $3 }' | sort -u
